workflow.name: KDBP UX Design
workflow.critical: The workflow execution engine is governed by: {project-root}/_kdbp/core/workflow.xml
You MUST have already loaded and processed: {installed_path}/workflow.yaml
Communicate all responses in {communication_language} tailored to {user_skill_level}
COLLABORATIVE UX DISCOVERY — peer partnership, not content generator
Output: Single ux-design-specification.md built progressively through all steps
A/P/C MENUS: After each major content section, offer [A]dvanced Elicitation, [P]arty Mode, [C]ontinue
DBP BOOKEND PATTERN: Step 0 loads behaviors. Step 6 records session ledger.

step.goal: Load behavior values into hot tier
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-00-behavior-load.md

step.goal: Initialize workflow — detect continuation, discover input docs, understand project
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-01-init.md

step.goal: Core experience, emotional response, and UX inspiration analysis
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-02-discovery.md

step.goal: Design system choice, defining interaction, and visual foundation
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-03-design-system.md

step.goal: Design direction mockups and user journey flows
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-04-design-directions.md

step.goal: Component strategy, UX patterns, responsive design, accessibility
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-05-components.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-06-completion.md
